title: justicia minutiflora
intro: Justicia minutiflora, also known as small-flowered justicia, is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Justicia minutiflora include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
